name: @juno-protocol/schema
description: Canonical Juno attestation schema — single source of truth, with EAS (ABI) and Borsh codecs and a round-trip equivalence test (JIP-1).
comment: The round-trip test is dependency-free and runs on any Node >=12. `ethers` is an OPTIONAL devDependency used only for an extra faithfulness cross-check (our hand-written ABI coder vs ethers' defaultAbiCoder); if it is not installed, that one assertion is skipped and the rest of the suite still runs.
